differential_diagnoses: Drug reaction with eosinophilia and systemic symptoms (DRESS) syndrome
next_steps: Perform skin scraping for scabies microscopic examination
Order serologic testing for syphilis (RPR and treponemal-specific test)
Perform viral PCR swabbing of oral ulcer and skin vesicles
Implement contact and droplet isolation precautions
Repeat CBC with manual differential to assess for eosinophilia
Obtain a detailed sexual and immunization history
